Professional Experience

Web developer

2024: Freelance

Developed websites for small projects of various types.

Frontend developer

2023: Pivdenmont

There I developed a frontend in React-Typescript for a company engaged in the manufacture and installation of metal structures, as well as the rental of construction cranes. I implemented the frontend part of a special tool for calculating elements of metal structures and choosing the type of construction crane based on the planned weight load, according to the physical dimensions of the building under construction.

Frontend developer

2022–2023: Startup “Time Angel”

This startup is designed for registration, convenient search for business projects and attracting investments. Where each project has its own preview page with a description, the ability to send a request to join the project to its administrator, interact with other project participants, correspond in project chats, share files, etc. There I was developing and implementing the frontend on Angular-Typescript and wrote services for interaction with Firebase.

Frontend developer

2022: ANL “All Night Long“

This company specializes in organizing concerts, parties, corporate events, festivals, where clients can order the organization of an event for a specific date or book tickets for an existing event. I implemented the frontend in React-Typescript for them.

Frontend developer

2020–2022: “AIT”, INC

This company is a conveyor belt for website development, where I implemented a ton of websites in HTML, SCSS, JavaScript and participated in the development of their main product on React-Typescript, designed for registration, search and monitoring of tenders.

Backend developer

2019-2020: Blockchain startup “Token-tema”

In this Blockchain startup I was involved in designing, developing, implementing and testing in Python and Django a referral matrix that distributes referral bonuses in a multi-level structure of users. I was also involved in implementing oAuth2 multi-factor authentication and other various features.

Software Developer,
Hardware Developer

2017-2019: EMV Energo

This company is engaged in the repair and modernization of power plant equipment. I assembled, installed and configured server cabinets serving power units. Participated in the development of specialized software code in Python for their operation with subsequent deployment in a cluster of Docker containers managed by Kubernetes.

Computer systems administrator,
Software developer,
Tech support

2016–2017: Lviv Polytechnic National University

There I was engaged in service support and maintenance of computer systems, digitalization of the educational institution’s document flow, filling databases, writing scripts for process automation, and providing technical support to users.

Security specialist,
Software developer,
Administrator of active directory,
Tech support

2010–2016: Public joint stock company "BANK FORUM", Department of information security systems.

There I administered the domain, wrote code and fixed bugs for internal banking-oriented software, was involved in servicing cryptographic keys with electronic digital signatures, and also provided technical support to users.

Education

Specialist of Information protection and security in computer systems and networks.

Institute of Computer Technology and Automation of Lviv Polytechnic National University.

Summary

I've always been interested in the direction of IT and the development of modern new technologies.
I had already worked on several fast-growing commercial projects, which gave me a boost to develop as an IT specialist.

If you ask me what a developer's job looks like, I would tell you the following. You constantly have to generate new ideas and tasks, search for solutions, operate with abstractions, think through the architecture and composition of the system elements, implement the code, then test, change, upgrade and test it again, and then start a new iteration, repeating the whole process over and over again to achieve the goal. In my opinion, this process is the most exciting in the developer's work and for me personally it is associated with the work of a natural scientist.

Programming on Python, I came to the conclusion that almost every modern application needs a web interface. I set myself the goal to master technologies for developing web interfaces and become a specialist in this interesting field. At the moment I am passionate about frontend development and I really like it, but I also have some work experience in the backend, so in the future I would like to develop as a full-stack developer.

I am always open to acquiring new knowledge and skills and improving existing ones.

Thank you for your time and have a nice day!
